title: Vercel API token committed to git via unguarded .env.local
impact: Credential exposure — token grants full Vercel API access and is present in git history
evidence: HELIX_VERCEL_TOKEN=vcp_1Nb4zesMHVDtft3qtcWtGXUeTs7sE2nwzqYKiYcmbYg2FQ37a52szwxD — confirmed tracked via git ls-files; docs .gitignore excludes .env and .env.production but not .env.local
fix_suggestion: Immediately rotate token in Vercel dashboard. Run git filter-repo --path apps/docs/.env.local --invert-paths to scrub history. Add .env*.local to apps/docs/.gitignore. Store only as GitHub Actions secret and Vercel environment variable.

title: No security headers configured in vercel.json
impact: Site vulnerable to clickjacking, MIME sniffing, protocol downgrade attacks, and XSS amplification
evidence: Entire headers block contains only X-Robots-Tag: noindex, nofollow. X-Frame-Options, CSP, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy all absent.
fix_suggestion: Add X-Frame-Options: DENY, X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff, Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains, Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin, Permissions-Policy: camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=(). Defer CSP until inline scrollspy script is extracted to a static file.

title: robots.txt Disallow: / blocks all search engine crawlers site-wide
impact: Entire documentation site invisible to search engines — enterprise teams cannot discover the component library via web search
evidence: User-agent: * / Disallow: / — complete crawl block confirmed. Combined with X-Robots-Tag: noindex, nofollow in vercel.json, indexing is double-blocked.
fix_suggestion: If site should be public: change Disallow: / to Disallow: (empty = allow all). If intentionally private, document the decision with a comment and planned public date.

title: No automated release or npm publish workflow exists
impact: Packages are never published to npm automatically — releases require manual intervention and are error-prone
evidence: Only ci.yml and ci-matrix.yml exist in .github/workflows/. Neither contains a publish step, changeset release step, or Vercel deploy step despite CLAUDE.md describing changesets-based automated publishing.
fix_suggestion: Create .github/workflows/release.yml using changesets/action to automate version bumps and npm publish on push to main.

title: Missing strict TypeScript flags in docs tsconfig.json
impact: noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes, noImplicitReturns, noFallthroughCasesInSwitch all inactive — multiple runtime bugs in this audit exist because these flags are off
evidence: tsconfig.json extends astro/tsconfigs/strict and adds only baseUrl/paths. Does not extend tsconfig.base.json or declare the four additional strict flags required by the monorepo standard.
fix_suggestion: Add noUncheckedIndexedAccess, exactOptionalPropertyTypes, noImplicitReturns, noFallthroughCasesInSwitch to compilerOptions in apps/docs/tsconfig.json.

title: Header.astro (2340 lines) and SiteNavbar.astro (2297 lines) are ~90% duplicate code
impact: Any change to mega-menu structure, showcase pages list, or dropdown styles must be made in two places and will inevitably drift — the showcasePages array is copy-pasted verbatim in both files
evidence: Both files contain identical 24 star divs, identical DNA helix markup, identical showcasePages constants, and near-identical 2000-line CSS blocks. SiteNavbar.astro also 2297 lines.
fix_suggestion: Extract showcasePages to src/data/showcase-pages.ts. Extract mega-panel HTML to ShowcaseMegaPanel.astro. Extract shared styles to src/styles/dropdown.css. Both components then become <200 lines.

title: StatsBar.astro hardcodes http://localhost:3159 as Admin Dashboard URL in production
impact: Every user who clicks Admin Dashboard in the stats bar on the production docs site receives a broken link to their local machine — live production defect
evidence: docsUrl: 'http://localhost:3159' hardcoded in the component stats data array, rendered into an <a> tag inside a modal dialog.
fix_suggestion: Replace with import.meta.env.PUBLIC_ADMIN_URL ?? 'https://admin.helix.example.com' or remove the link for public builds.

title: Hero.astro uses NEXT_PUBLIC_ env prefix (Next.js only) — Storybook link always serves localhost:3151
impact: Every production visitor who clicks View Storybook receives an HTTP link to localhost:3151 — broken on every user's machine
evidence: const storybookUrl = import.meta.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_HELIX_STORYBOOK_URL ?? 'http://localhost:3151' — NEXT_PUBLIC_ is a Next.js convention; Astro requires PUBLIC_ prefix for client-exposed variables, so this always uses the fallback.
fix_suggestion: Rename to PUBLIC_HELIX_STORYBOOK_URL in .env.local, Vercel environment variables, and Hero.astro:19. Change the fallback to the actual production Storybook URL.

title: Zero test infrastructure configured for the docs app
impact: Custom TypeScript utilities powering all API reference tables, a custom HTMLElement on every page, and all client-side interaction logic are completely untested — bugs ship silently
evidence: package.json has no test script. No vitest.config.* exists. The Turborepo test pipeline excludes apps/docs. Root Playwright config targets port 3151 (Storybook), not 3150 (docs).
fix_suggestion: Add Vitest for src/lib/ utilities. Add a test script to package.json. Register in Turborepo test pipeline. Create a Playwright project targeting http://localhost:3150 for E2E coverage.

title: wc-input event listener never fires — active production defect after hx- prefix migration
impact: Component Genome gallery search does not clear category filters when typing — the category filter clearing logic at lines 82-84 is silently dead
evidence: searchInput.addEventListener('wc-input', ...) — the library dispatches hx-input (confirmed in hx-text-input.ts:228: new CustomEvent('hx-input', ...)). wc-input is never dispatched. Regression from commit c643de6.
fix_suggestion: Change 'wc-input' to 'hx-input' on line 79 of GalleryScript.astro. Add an E2E test confirming category filter clearing executes on search input.

title: Broken aria-labelledby in all StatsBar modal dialogs — target IDs don't exist in DOM
impact: All stats bar dialogs announced to screen readers with no accessible name — aria-labelledby references stat-modal-title-N but no element has that id
evidence: aria-labelledby={`stat-modal-title-${i}`} — no element with id=stat-modal-title-0 (or any index) exists anywhere in the component template.
fix_suggestion: Add id={`stat-modal-title-${i}`} to the <div> containing {stat.label} at line 120. Wrap it in an <h2> to also fix the heading structure.

title: PageTitle source-path pill is a div+onclick — completely keyboard inaccessible on every docs page
impact: The source-path copy control appears on every Starlight documentation page — keyboard-only users, switch-access users, and screen reader users cannot activate it
evidence: <div class=source-path id=source-path-pill onclick={48 lines of interpolated JS}> — a <div> with no role, no tabindex, no keyboard handler.
fix_suggestion: Replace the <div> with <button type=button aria-label=Copy source path>. Move the 48-line onclick string to a <script> block using addEventListener.

title: ComponentLoader eagerly imports all 13 library components (171 KB) on every documentation page
impact: A user visiting hx-button docs downloads and parses 12 additional unused component definitions — 171 KB JS (30 KB gzipped) per page load
evidence: 13 static import statements for all library components in a single <script> block. Included in 30 MDX files including single-component pages like hx-button.mdx.
fix_suggestion: Replace monolithic loader with per-page targeted imports. Each MDX page imports only the component(s) it demonstrates. The component-genome page that needs all 13 keeps the full list.

title: 172 KB global CSS (custom.css 3873 lines) loaded on every documentation page
impact: Simple documentation pages like getting-started/installation receive full hero, particle, glassmorphic, and animation CSS — 30 KB gzipped per page
evidence: custom.css is 85589 bytes injected globally via astro.config.mjs:52 (customCss: ['./src/styles/custom.css']). Built CSS bundle: 172 KB raw / 30 KB gzipped.
fix_suggestion: Split into layers: hero/splash rules to home-hero.css (index page only); showcase rules to showcase.css (already partially started in src/styles/showcase/). Keep only global resets/tokens in custom.css.

title: DOM XSS pattern in PageTitle.astro onclick handler via unescaped filePath interpolation
impact: A content file with special characters in its path can break out of the onclick JS context — safe today but dangerous as an established pattern
evidence: onclick={`(function(el) { var path = '${filePath}'; ... })(this)`} — filePath is route.entry.id joined with a prefix string, unescaped before interpolation into an onclick attribute string.
fix_suggestion: Replace inline onclick with a <script> block using addEventListener. Pass filePath via a data-filepath attribute and read it via el.dataset.filepath.

title: Missing og:image and twitter:image on all pages
impact: When any documentation page is shared on LinkedIn, Twitter/X, or Slack, no image preview appears — text-only share cards with significantly reduced click-through rates
evidence: Starlight config defines title and description but no og:image or twitter:image. Verified in built dist/index.html: og:title, og:description, og:url present — og:image completely absent.
fix_suggestion: Add { tag: 'meta', attrs: { property: 'og:image', content: 'https://wc-2026.dev/og-image.png' } } and twitter:image equivalent to the head array in Starlight config.

title: Docs app excluded from CI pipeline — astro check never runs in CI
impact: TypeScript errors in .astro files and Astro-specific type violations go undetected until a developer runs astro check locally
evidence: ci.yml runs turbo build which invokes astro check && astro build for docs, but only as a build step — not as a separate gated type-check. The Turborepo type-check task only covers packages/hx-library.
fix_suggestion: Add an explicit npm run type-check:docs step to ci.yml that runs astro check in isolation, separate from and before the build step.

title: Turborepo remote cache not configured — every CI run rebuilds from scratch
impact: Every CI run performs a full cold build of the entire monorepo regardless of what changed — maximizes build times and wastes CI minutes
evidence: turbo.json has no remoteCache configuration. Neither workflow file references TURBO_TOKEN or TURBO_TEAM environment variables.
fix_suggestion: Add TURBO_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.TURBO_TOKEN }} and TURBO_TEAM: ${{ secrets.TURBO_TEAM }} to ci.yml env block. Configure tokens via Vercel dashboard Remote Cache settings.

title: Inline scrollspy script in astro.config.mjs prevents Content-Security-Policy enforcement
impact: 75-line inline script requires unsafe-inline in CSP, making the entire Content-Security-Policy substantially weaker and blocking strict CSP implementation
evidence: { tag: 'script', content: `(function() { ... })();` } — 75-line IIFE injected as inline script in every page head. No nonce or hash set.
fix_suggestion: Extract to public/scrollspy.js and reference as { tag: 'script', attrs: { src: '/scrollspy.js', defer: true } }. This enables strict script-src 'self' CSP.

title: StatsBar modal dialogs missing focus trap — keyboard escapes to background document
impact: Keyboard users can Tab past the close button into the obscured background document, violating WCAG 2.1 SC 2.1.2 and the ARIA dialog authoring pattern
evidence: closeBtn?.focus() on open is correct, but no event listener intercepts Tab/Shift+Tab to cycle within the modal's focusable descendants.
fix_suggestion: Implement a focus trap in the open handler, or replace div[role=dialog] with a native <dialog> element which provides built-in focus trapping.

title: Token Explorer tablist missing arrow key navigation and roving tabindex
impact: Keyboard users cannot navigate between tabs using Arrow keys as required by ARIA APG tab pattern — all inactive tabs are in the tab order forcing excessive Tab presses
evidence: Inline tab script at line 964 handles only click events. No ArrowLeft, ArrowRight, Home, or End handling. No tabindex=-1 on inactive tabs.
fix_suggestion: Add arrow key + roving tabindex logic matching the APG keyboard pattern. The TabSwitchScript.astro component already implements this correctly — use it here.

title: Token Explorer copy rows are div+click — keyboard inaccessible
impact: Dozens of token copy rows completely inaccessible to keyboard users — no role, no tabindex, no keyboard handler on any copy row element
evidence: <div class=te-copy-row data-copy={t.tokenPath}> — no role, no tabindex. JavaScript click listener at line 986 but no keyboard event handler.
fix_suggestion: Replace each <div class=te-copy-row> with <button type=button class=te-copy-row aria-label={`Copy token: ${t.tokenPath}`}>.

title: Gradient text (-webkit-text-fill-color: transparent) invisible in Windows High Contrast Mode
impact: Users relying on Windows High Contrast Mode see completely invisible headline text on showcase pages — primary headings disappear
evidence: -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent; background-clip: text pattern in GalleryBanner.astro:154, SiteNavbar.astro:413, Header.astro:1745, A11yBusinessCase.astro:115,124,133,142. No @media (forced-colors: active) override exists in any file.
fix_suggestion: Add @media (forced-colors: active) { .gradient-text { -webkit-text-fill-color: ButtonText; background: none; } } to each affected component.

title: topBtn dereferenced without null guard in component-genome.astro — runtime crash risk
impact: document.getElementById returns HTMLElement | null — both classList.add() and addEventListener() called without null check causing TypeError if element absent
evidence: var topBtn = document.getElementById('back-to-top'); ... topBtn.classList.add('visible') — no null guard between assignment and dereference at lines 542-551.
fix_suggestion: Add if (!topBtn) return; immediately after the getElementById call.

title: Starlight virtual modules typed as JSX.Element instead of AstroComponentFactory
impact: TypeScript will not flag incorrect prop usage of Starlight overridden components since they are typed as rendered values not callable components
evidence: declare module 'virtual:starlight/components/Search' { const Search: astroHTML.JSX.Element; } — JSX.Element is a rendered expression type, not a component factory type. Repeated for all 5 virtual module declarations.
fix_suggestion: Import AstroComponentFactory from 'astro/runtime/server/index.js' and use it as the type for all five virtual module declarations.

title: Unsafe as CemManifest cast on JSON import without type validation in cem-utils.ts
impact: If CEM format changes after npm run cem regenerates the manifest, no compile-time error occurs — runtime errors appear in API tables across all 14 component docs pages
evidence: const manifest = cemJson as CemManifest; — cemJson is typed as unknown from the JSON import; the cast bypasses all structural validation.
fix_suggestion: Implement a type guard isCemManifest(v: unknown): v is CemManifest that validates schemaVersion and modules array presence before the cast.

title: orb-pulse keyframe animates filter:blur() on 4 hero elements — continuous main-thread GPU repaint
impact: filter: blur() cannot be composited on the GPU — forces full repaint on the main thread for the entire page lifecycle on the homepage
evidence: @keyframes orb-pulse { 0%, 100% { filter: blur(100px); } 50% { filter: blur(120px); } } applied to .hero-orb-1 through .hero-orb-4 with infinite iteration at 7-10 second durations.
fix_suggestion: Animate only opacity in orb-pulse. Set a static filter: blur(100px) as a non-animated CSS property on .hero-orb. Visual result nearly identical but eliminates all paint frames.

title: scroll-reveal class transitions filter:blur() on every scroll-triggered element site-wide
impact: Every .scroll-reveal element (dozens across GalleryBanner, FeatureGrid, StatsBar) triggers a filter: blur(4px) to blur(0) transition causing main-thread repaint during each 0.8s reveal
evidence: .scroll-reveal { filter: blur(4px); transition: opacity, transform, filter 0.8s; } .scroll-reveal.is-visible { filter: blur(0); } — filter on a site-wide class.
fix_suggestion: Remove filter from the transition list and remove filter: blur(4px) initial state. Keep only opacity and transform — both GPU-composited.

title: Font Awesome all.min.css (~70 KB) loaded twice — only 3 of 6 icon families used
impact: Full Font Awesome CSS loaded on every page and again on showcase pages creating duplicate load; unused icon families waste ~45 KB of the 70 KB payload
evidence: href: cdnjs.cloudflare.com/ajax/libs/font-awesome/6.7.2/css/all.min.css in both astro.config.mjs:87 and ShowcaseLayout.astro:39. Grep confirms only fa-solid, fa-regular, fa-brands used.
fix_suggestion: Remove ShowcaseLayout.astro duplicate. Replace all.min.css with solid.min.css, regular.min.css, brands.min.css (~25 KB total vs ~70 KB).

title: getBoundingClientRect() inside mousemove handler causes forced layout reflow on every pixel
impact: getBoundingClientRect() forces synchronous style recalculation on every mouse-movement pixel — dozens of forced reflows per second. Duplicated in 4 additional showcase pages.
evidence: card.addEventListener('mousemove', function(e) { var rect = card.getBoundingClientRect(); ... }) — also in developer-experience.astro:369, enterprise-architecture.astro:652, detailed-pitch.astro:753, full-presentation.astro:1054.
fix_suggestion: Cache rect outside the handler. Invalidate using a ResizeObserver on the card element.

title: WcShowcaseDropdown attaches permanent document click listener with no disconnectedCallback — memory leak
impact: On view transitions, repeated navigations accumulate listeners indefinitely — each listener holds a closure reference preventing garbage collection of the element
evidence: document.addEventListener('click', (e) => { ... }) in constructor. grep disconnectedCallback returns no matches in the file — lifecycle method entirely absent.
fix_suggestion: Store handler as a class field arrow function. Add connectedCallback() to attach and disconnectedCallback() to remove via document.removeEventListener.

title: No Cache-Control: immutable headers for hashed /_astro/ static assets
impact: Repeat visitors re-download all JS and CSS on every visit — Vercel applies short-lived default caching for hashed assets that should be immutable
evidence: vercel.json has one header rule (X-Robots-Tag) applied to /(.*). No rule exists for /_astro/(.*) assets. Astro builds content-hash filenames safe for 1-year immutable caching.
fix_suggestion: Add { source: '/_astro/(.*)', headers: [{ key: 'Cache-Control', value: 'public, max-age=31536000, immutable' }] } to the headers array.

title: No Playwright E2E tests target the docs app at port 3150
impact: All interactive pages (Component Genome, Token Explorer, showcase dropdown keyboard nav, skip links) have zero automated browser testing — client-side bugs ship undetected
evidence: playwright.config.ts sets baseURL: 'http://localhost:3151' (Storybook) and testDir: './packages/hx-library/e2e'. No test files exist under apps/docs/.
fix_suggestion: Add a Playwright project entry targeting http://localhost:3150. Create E2E tests for Component Genome search/filter, showcase dropdown keyboard nav, token explorer tab switching, and skip links.

title: ApiTable th elements missing scope=col on every component API reference table
impact: Screen readers cannot programmatically associate header cells with data cells — violates WCAG 2.1 SC 1.3.1 on every component documentation page
evidence: {columns.map((col) => (<th>{col}</th>))} — no scope attribute on any column header across all API reference tables.
fix_suggestion: Change to <th scope=col>{col}</th>.

title: Comparison.astro ARIA table pattern missing role=rowgroup to separate header from body rows
impact: Some screen reader implementations cannot correctly identify the table structure without role=rowgroup separating header and data rows
evidence: <div role=table> directly contains <div class=comparison-header role=row> with no intermediate role=rowgroup container.
fix_suggestion: Wrap the header row in <div role=rowgroup> and wrap data rows in a separate <div role=rowgroup>. Or replace entire pattern with a native <table> with <thead> and <tbody>.

title: ShowcaseLayout pages missing skip navigation link
impact: Token Explorer, Component Genome, Elevator Pitch, and other showcase pages have no skip link — keyboard users must Tab through entire fixed navbar before reaching content
evidence: ShowcaseLayout.astro renders <SiteNavbar> but has no skip link element. Starlight-based pages have the overridden SkipLink.astro; showcase pages do not inherit it.
fix_suggestion: Add a visually-hidden skip link as the first focusable element in ShowcaseLayout.astro targeting the main content area, using the same pattern as SkipLink.astro.

title: WcShowcaseDropdown does not move focus to first menu item when opened
impact: When a keyboard user activates the Showcase pages trigger, the dropdown opens but focus remains on the trigger — user must Tab to reach menu items, violating ARIA menu button authoring pattern
evidence: open() sets aria-expanded=true and panel.style.display=flex but never calls .focus() on a menu item.
fix_suggestion: After the requestAnimationFrame that adds is-open, call this.panel.querySelector('.showcase-item')?.focus().

title: Token Explorer tabpanels missing aria-labelledby association to tab buttons
impact: Screen readers announce each tabpanel as an unlabelled region when it receives focus — ARIA APG requires tabpanels to be labelled by their controlling tab
evidence: <div class=te-panel active id=panel-colors role=tabpanel> — tabs have aria-controls=panel-colors but no corresponding id on tab buttons and no aria-labelledby on panels.
fix_suggestion: Add id=tab-{tab.id} to each <button role=tab>. Add aria-labelledby=tab-{tab.id} to each <div role=tabpanel>.

title: document.execCommand('copy') deprecated API used as clipboard fallback in two locations
impact: Deprecated API removed from Web spec — in token-explorer failure is explicitly silenced with comment leaving users with no feedback on copy failure
evidence: document.execCommand('copy') in PageTitle.astro:34,44 and token-explorer.astro:1022 as fallback after navigator.clipboard.writeText. All modern browsers support the Clipboard API.
fix_suggestion: Remove execCommand fallback entirely. In catch block, show a visible error state (e.g., change button icon for 2 seconds).

title: Missing Apple-specific meta tags (apple-touch-icon and theme-color)
impact: iOS browsers use SVG favicon fallback for home screen icons; missing theme-color means browser chrome does not match site theme on mobile
evidence: No apple-touch-icon link or theme-color meta tag found in built dist/index.html.
fix_suggestion: Add { tag: 'link', attrs: { rel: 'apple-touch-icon', href: '/apple-touch-icon.png' } } and { tag: 'meta', attrs: { name: 'theme-color', content: '#0f172a' } } to Starlight head config.

title: WcShowcaseDropdown registered with deprecated wc- prefix instead of project-standard hx-
impact: Custom element naming violates project hx- prefix convention — causes confusion for contributors and breaks Storybook URL generation in GallerySection.astro
evidence: customElements.define('wc-showcase-dropdown', WcShowcaseDropdown) — and GallerySection.astro:35: const shortName = tagName.replace('wc-', '') which never matches hx- tags.
fix_suggestion: Rename to hx-showcase-dropdown and update all HTML/template references. Fix GallerySection.astro:35 to replace('hx-', '').

title: WcShowcaseDropdown class fields lack definite assignment assertions under strictPropertyInitialization
impact: Under strictPropertyInitialization (part of --strict), trigger, panel, canvas fields must be assigned at declaration or use ! definite assignment assertions
evidence: trigger: HTMLButtonElement; panel: HTMLElement; canvas: HTMLCanvasElement; declared without definite assignment assertions or inline initialization.
fix_suggestion: Add ! assertions (trigger!: HTMLButtonElement) or initialize with a helper method. Document why the constructor throw guarantees initialization.

title: 10+ simultaneous infinite CSS animations on homepage including non-compositable filter properties
impact: Multiple animations use filter: blur() which cannot be composited on GPU — worst-case scenario for mobile devices and low-end hardware
evidence: .hero-orb-1 { animation: float-slow 20s infinite, orb-pulse 8s infinite; } through .hero-orb-4 plus particle-drift (60s) and grid-breathe (20s). Multiple keyframes animate filter: blur().
fix_suggestion: Consolidate float-slow + orb-pulse into a single keyframe per orb. Remove grid-breathe opacity animation (use static). Fix orb-pulse to animate only opacity.

title: lit and shiki declared as direct dependencies in docs package.json but never directly imported
impact: Redundant lit declaration can create version conflicts with @helix/library transitive dependency; shiki explicit declaration may conflict with @astrojs/starlight bundled version
evidence: Zero import ... from 'lit' or import ... from 'shiki' statements in any apps/docs/src/ file. Both in dependencies not devDependencies.
fix_suggestion: Remove lit and shiki from apps/docs/package.json. Both are resolved transitively. Keep sharp (required by Astro image optimization service).

title: Vercel Analytics injected on every page via SkipLink.astro without deferred loading strategy
impact: Analytics beacon script loads on every page including pages with noindex/nofollow — collecting analytics on a site marked as private is contradictory and adds unnecessary script load
evidence: import Analytics from '@vercel/analytics/astro'; <Analytics /> in SkipLink.astro rendered in Starlight head area. No strategy attribute set.
fix_suggestion: Move analytics to a dedicated layout-level component with strategy=afterInteractive. If site is intentionally private, remove analytics entirely.

title: Inter variable font loads full optical-size and italic axes — approximately 2x larger than needed
impact: Italic and optical size axes are unused — font payload is approximately twice as large as necessary
evidence: family=Inter:ital,opsz,wght@0,14..32,100..900;1,14..32,100..900&display=swap — full axis range including italic. Used weights: 300,400,500,600,700,800,900. Italic not used in any content.
fix_suggestion: Narrow to family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&display=swap. No italic, no optical size. Approximately halves the font payload.

title: docs .gitignore missing .env.local pattern — future credential exposure risk
impact: Future contributors may add credentials to .env.local believing it is protected — it is not. Only .env and .env.production are excluded at the docs level.
evidence: apps/docs/.gitignore lists .env and .env.production only. .env.local, .env.development.local, .env.test.local are not listed.
fix_suggestion: Add .env*.local to apps/docs/.gitignore.

title: crossorigin: true (boolean) instead of 'anonymous' string in astro.config.mjs fonts.gstatic.com preconnect
impact: Astro serializes crossorigin: true as crossorigin=true — not a valid attribute value, causing the preconnect to operate as non-CORS defeating its purpose
evidence: { rel: 'preconnect', href: 'https://fonts.gstatic.com', crossorigin: true } — line 90 correctly uses crossorigin: 'anonymous'.
fix_suggestion: Change crossorigin: true to crossorigin: 'anonymous' on line 73.

title: Node.js version not pinned to patch level in CI
impact: node-version: 20 allows any Node.js 20.x.x patch release — patch updates can introduce behavior changes causing non-deterministic build failures
evidence: node-version: 20 in actions/setup-node — major version only, no minor or patch pin.
fix_suggestion: Pin to a specific patch: node-version: '20.19.0'. Or use a .nvmrc file and node-version-file: '.nvmrc'.

title: VRT server startup uses fragile sleep 5 before running visual regression tests
impact: sleep 5 assumes server starts in under 5 seconds — on slow CI runners or cold starts VRT tests begin before server is ready causing flaky non-deterministic failures
evidence: npx http-server apps/storybook/dist -p 3151 & sleep 5 && npm run test:vrt
fix_suggestion: Replace sleep 5 with npx wait-on http://localhost:3151 --timeout 30000.

title: --wc- token prefix still used in 553 locations in docs styles after library migrated to --hx-
impact: Inconsistent presentation layer between library (--hx- prefix) and docs (--wc- prefix) confuses consumers reading the documentation
evidence: grep -r 'var(--wc-' apps/docs/src/ returns 553 matches. --wc-accent, --wc-cyan, --wc-amber defined in custom.css:40-46. Library migrated in commit c643de6.
fix_suggestion: Migrate custom.css and all affected .astro files to use --hx- prefixed tokens. Docs-only presentation layer change that will not affect the library.

title: GallerySection.astro replace('wc-', '') never matches hx- tags — all Storybook links generate broken URLs
impact: Every Storybook link from the Component Genome gallery page uses a broken URL — 'hx-button'.replace('wc-', '') returns 'hx-button' unchanged, producing components-hx-button--docs
evidence: const shortName = tagName.replace('wc-', ''); — tag names have hx- prefix. wc- never matches.
fix_suggestion: Change to tagName.replace('hx-', '').

title: StatsBar.astro hardcodes Last Updated 2026-02-16 date — stale immediately
impact: Users see an incorrect last-updated date in perpetuity without manual edits — description is already stale as of 2026-02-23
evidence: { value: '2026-02-16', label: 'Last Updated', description: 'Documentation and component library last updated February 16, 2026.' } — static string.
fix_suggestion: Derive dynamically at build time: new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0].

title: Copy failures silently swallowed in CodeBlock.astro and token-explorer.astro — no user feedback
impact: When clipboard write fails (denied permissions, no document focus), users receive no visual feedback — in token-explorer the failure is explicitly commented as silently fail
evidence: catch (err) { console.error('Failed to copy code:', err); } in CodeBlock. catch (err) { /* silently fail */ } in token-explorer.astro:1022.
fix_suggestion: Show a visible error state — change the button icon to a failure indicator for 2 seconds, or display a tooltip 'Copy failed — try Ctrl+C'.

title: hexToRgba() returns NaN for 3-digit hex inputs — no validation no tests
impact: Token swatches render with invalid CSS color rgba(N, N, NaN, 1) for any design token using shorthand 3-digit hex values
evidence: parseInt(clean.substring(4, 6), 16) — for 3-digit hex like #abc, substring(4,6) returns '' and parseInt('', 16) returns NaN. No input validation before parsing.
fix_suggestion: Add: if (clean.length === 3) clean = clean.split('').map(c => c + c).join(''); to expand 3-digit hex before parsing. Add unit tests.

title: getComponentData() drives all component API tables but has zero test coverage
impact: A bug in the member filter (line 151: m.attribute &&) silently drops members from rendered API tables across all 14 component documentation pages — no test validates correct output
evidence: Zero test files reference cem-utils. The filter m.kind === 'field' && m.attribute && m.privacy !== 'private' && !m.static && !m.readonly is complex and entirely untested.
fix_suggestion: Create src/lib/__tests__/cem-utils.test.ts with fixture-based tests for: happy path, unknown tag, empty arrays, private/static/readonly filtering, and CEM schema variations.

title: Hero scroll button missing :focus-visible style
impact: The role=button scroll indicator can receive keyboard focus but has no visible focus indicator, violating WCAG 2.4.7 Focus Visible
evidence: .hero-scroll-btn and .mouse-scroll-wrap have no :focus-visible CSS rule in Hero.astro or custom.css despite role=button and tabindex=0.
fix_suggestion: Add .hero-scroll-btn:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid var(--wc-accent); outline-offset: 2px; }.

title: source-path pill touch target ~28px on desktop — below 44px WCAG minimum
impact: The source-path copy control has smaller tap target than WCAG 2.5.5 minimum on desktop — min-height: 44px only applies at mobile breakpoint
evidence: .source-path { padding: 0.3rem 0.65rem; } on desktop — approximately 28px tall at 16px root font size. min-height: 44px only in mobile media query at line 306.
fix_suggestion: Move min-height: 44px outside the mobile breakpoint to apply unconditionally to .source-path.

title: Font size 0.5625rem (9px) on token-explorer copy row labels
impact: 9px text in an interactive UI element is extremely difficult to read for users with low vision who have not activated OS zoom
evidence: .te-copy-row-label { font-size: 0.5625rem; } — 9px at 16px root font size.
fix_suggestion: Set a minimum of 0.75rem (12px) for visible text in interactive elements.

title: Token Explorer tab icon elements missing aria-hidden=true
impact: Screen readers may attempt to announce Font Awesome icon glyph characters or class names when focusing tab buttons
evidence: — no aria-hidden=true attribute on decorative icon elements inside tab buttons.
fix_suggestion: Add aria-hidden=true to each <i> element in tab buttons.

title: aria-live=assertive used for low-urgency copy toast — should be polite
impact: assertive interrupts any ongoing screen reader speech immediately — copy confirmation is low-urgency and should wait for current utterance to finish
evidence: <div class=copy-toast id=copy-toast aria-live=assertive> — assertive is reserved for error messages and time-sensitive alerts, not clipboard confirmations.
fix_suggestion: Change to aria-live=polite. Add aria-atomic=true to ensure the full Copied! message is read as a unit.

title: Double canvas.width/height assignment erases ctx.scale(dpr,dpr) transform — HiDPI rendering bug
impact: Particle animation renders at 1x resolution on HiDPI displays — setting canvas.width after ctx.scale() resets the 2D context state including the scale transform
evidence: this.ctx.scale(dpr, dpr); this.canvas.width = rect.width * dpr; this.canvas.height = rect.height * dpr; — scale applied then immediately cleared by dimension reassignment at lines 144-145.
fix_suggestion: Remove lines 144-145. Canvas dimensions are already set at lines 137-138 before getContext('2d') is called.

title: GallerySection.astro Storybook map uses wc- prefix keys — dead code never matched
impact: storybookMap['wc-container'] and storybookMap['wc-radio'] never match since all tagName values have hx- prefix — dead code that contributes nothing
evidence: const storybookMap: Record<string, string> = { 'wc-container': 'layout-container', 'wc-radio': 'components-radio-group' } — keys use old wc- prefix, tags use hx- prefix.
fix_suggestion: Update keys to 'hx-container' and 'hx-radio', or remove if the default pattern covers them.

title: Missing web app manifest.json
impact: No installability metadata for browsers that support PWA installation — no custom theme color, display mode, or app name for home-screen pinning
evidence: No manifest.json or site.webmanifest found in apps/docs/public/ directory.
fix_suggestion: Create public/manifest.json with basic PWA metadata: name, short_name, start_url, display, theme_color, background_color, icons.

title: Duplicate @keyframes definitions in custom.css and animations.css
impact: fadeInUp, fadeIn, float-slow, float-drift defined in both files — showcase pages parse duplicate keyframes adding to CSS payload
evidence: @keyframes fadeInUp at custom.css:256 and animations.css:5; same for fadeIn, float-slow, float-drift. Both files loaded on showcase pages.
fix_suggestion: Remove the four duplicate keyframe definitions from animations.css. custom.css is the authoritative source loaded first.

title: 23 img elements missing loading=lazy attribute
impact: 23 img tags across showcase components fetched eagerly on page load even when below the fold
evidence: grep -r 'loading=' apps/docs/src/ returns no matches on tags. 23+ instances in showcase components (StackVisualization, StackIntegrationMap, StackComparisons).
fix_suggestion: Add loading=lazy to all below-fold images. Add fetchpriority=high to the most prominent above-fold hero image.

title: No npm security audit in CI pipeline
impact: Dependency vulnerabilities go undetected until manually discovered or exploited — notable gap for a healthcare-grade library
evidence: Neither ci.yml nor ci-matrix.yml contains an npm audit step.
fix_suggestion: Add npm audit --audit-level=high to ci.yml after npm ci.

title: No staging or preview environment configuration for pull requests
impact: Pull requests have no preview deployment — reviewers cannot visually inspect documentation changes without running the site locally
evidence: No pull_request trigger workflow exists in .github/workflows/. vercel.json has no environment-specific configuration.
fix_suggestion: Create .github/workflows/preview.yml using Vercel CLI to deploy preview environments on pull_request events.

title: Vercel Analytics coupled to accessibility SkipLink component — separated concerns
impact: Analytics injection is semantically unrelated to skip link — if the skip link override is removed or refactored, analytics silently stops loading site-wide with no indication
evidence: import Analytics from '@vercel/analytics/astro'; <Analytics /> in SkipLink.astro alongside the skip navigation link.
fix_suggestion: Move analytics to a dedicated layout-level component or directly into the Starlight layout override.
